resolved.verification_evidence: Modified prepareDispatchArtifacts to serialize generated pending tasks to prevent ENOENT.
Updated submitCommand to use workspace-local execution path instead of absolute.
Added PowerShell-compatible Get-Content fallback instructions to the worker prompt.
Skipped by user to preserve OpenToken accounting dependencies (no source changes made).
Strengthened file_coverage instructions in the prompt to prevent agents from zeroing out total_lines.
